---
title: "About this repository"
subtitle: "Project-level documents — README, contributing, security policy, change log"
description: "Repository-root documents (README, AGENTS, CHANGELOG, contributing guidelines, security policy, support, code of conduct) rendered on the UIAO site."
categories: [meta]
---

These pages surface the **repository-root documents** that GitHub recognizes by
filename (`README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `SECURITY.md`, etc.) so they are
also visible to readers who land on this site without going to the GitHub
repo. Each page is a thin wrapper that includes the canonical source file
from the repository root — there is no second copy to keep in sync.

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
The authoritative copies live at the repository root. These pages render the
same content via Quarto `{{< include >}}` shortcodes.
:::

## Documents

| Page | Source | Purpose |
|------|--------|---------|
| [README](readme.qmd) | `README.md` | Project overview and entry point |
| [AGENTS guide](agents.qmd) | `AGENTS.md` | Agent integration (Claude Code, Codex, IDE agents) |
| [Changelog](changelog.qmd) | `CHANGELOG.md` | Release-by-release change history |
| [Release notes](release-notes.qmd) | `RELEASE_NOTES.md` | Current release notes |
| [Contributing](contributing.qmd) | `CONTRIBUTING.md` | How to contribute to UIAO |
| [Security policy](security.qmd) | `SECURITY.md` | Vulnerability reporting and disclosure |
| [Support](support.qmd) | `SUPPORT.md` | Where to get help |
| [Code of conduct](code-of-conduct.qmd) | `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md` | Community standards |
